Identification.LongTitle: An Act to amend the Controlled Drugs and Substances Act (supervised drug consumption sites)
Identification.RunningHead: An Act to amend the Controlled Drugs and Substances Act (supervised drug consumption sites)

Provision.Text: This enactment amends the Controlled Drugs and Substances Act to provide that regulations made and exemptions granted under that Act must not have the effect of allowing a site providing services in relation to the consumption of certain substances to be located within 500 metres of an elementary or secondary school, a daycare centre or a playground.
His Majesty, by and with the advice and consent of the Senate and House of Commons of Canada, enacts as follows:

Section.Text: The Controlled Drugs and Substances Act is amended by adding the following after the heading âRegulations and Exemptionsâ before section 55:

Despite any other provision of this Act, regulations made and exemptions granted under this Act must not have the effect of allowing a site providing services in relation to the consumption of any controlled substance or precursor â or any class of either of them â that is obtained in a manner not authorized under this Act to be located within 500 metres of an elementary or secondary school, a daycare centre or a playground.

Any exemption or authorization that is granted or issued under the Controlled Drugs and Substances Act, that is valid on the day on which this Act comes into force and that applies, directly or indirectly, in respect of a site providing services in relation to the consumption of any controlled substance or precursor â or any class of either of them â that is obtained in a manner not authorized under that Act is

Paragraph.Label: (a)
Paragraph.Text: revoked on that day, to the extent that the exemption or authorization applies in respect of a site located within 500 metres of an elementary or secondary school, a daycare centre or a playground; or

Paragraph.Label: (b)
Paragraph.Text: deemed to include as a condition that such services must not be provided at the site when it is within 500 metres of an elementary or secondary school, a daycare centre or a playground, if the exemption or authorization applies in respect of a mobile site.

Section.Text: This Act comes into force 180 days after the day on which it receives royal assent.
